title: Grayscale Pale Garden
description: A mod that adds grayscale effect to Pale Garden
body:
**GrayScale Pale Garden**

A _client-side_ Fabric mod that transforms the Pale Garden biome into a unique visual experience with custom colors and atmospheric effects.

![pale garden](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aea4b0463443fe5edcc4dd5dcb0c2c372f025d62_0.webp)

Mod support shaders

![shader pale garden](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76ca188633483cc730cefa62f21613ba53de7d4c_0.webp)

There's also a resource pack in the mod so that when grayscale is turned off, the pale garden turns green.

![day pale garden](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa7c7a6bb40654768bbcb1abcdf22130e7ad1144_0.webp)

**WARNING**

In this moment mod in beta! I'm currently working on improving the visuals, textures, and shaders. If you find any bugs, please file an issue on GitHub.
